label: In the genetic dynasty of the Empire, if a Brother Day dies, a clone of Brother Day can replace him, even within the same generation.

The genetic dynasty succession: when Brother Day reaches old age, he is succeeded by Brother Dawn, who is renamed Brother Day. The former Brother Day becomes Brother Dusk, and the former Brother Dusk becomes Brother Darkness and is vaporized. His ashes bless the new infant Cleon I clone, who becomes Brother Dawn.
